name: Montana v. Wyoming
question: What award of fees does the State of Wyoming owe to the State of Montana for violating the Yellowstone River Compact by reducing the volume of water available in the Tongue River?
description: A case in which the Court awarded the State of Montana $20,340 in judgment and $67,270.87 in costs for the State of Wyoming’s reduction in the volume of water available in the Tongue River, in violation of the Yellowstone River Compact.
